risk_categories.name: Operational
risk_categories.description: Risks that affect delivery speed, service reliability, or daily process execution.

risk_categories.name: Technology
risk_categories.description: Risks caused by legacy systems, weak integrations, poor data quality, or system downtime.

risk_categories.name: Financial
risk_categories.description: Risks caused by budget overruns, unclear cost ownership, or weak cost controls.

risk_categories.name: Change Management
risk_categories.description: Risks caused by resistance to new workflows, unclear ownership, or training gaps.

risk_categories.name: Environmental
risk_categories.description: Risks caused by climate, terrain, ecosystem impact, or physical operating conditions.

scoring_scale.Low: Manageable risk with limited expected disruption.
scoring_scale.Medium: Moderate risk requiring mitigation planning and active monitoring.
scoring_scale.High: Material risk requiring leadership attention, contingency planning, and phased rollout.
